title: drosera bulbosa subsp. major
intro: Drosera bulbosa subsp. major, also known as the giant sundew, is a carnivorous plant species that belongs to the Drosera genus. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Drosera bulbosa subsp. major include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve sleep quality. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
